raw_action_dict.reasoning: Delta of -10.8° to WP87 confirms the track continues curving right, so I apply -10° steering at 1.5 speed to follow the curve smoothly without overcorrecting.
knowledge: Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn
Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation

Heading near -147° to -158° corresponds to westward/southwest travel on this section

Track width ~0.76m — small corrections are sufficient, avoid overcorrecting
